meaning: adj.水的,似水的,潮湿的,平淡的,稀薄的,松软的,水淋淋的,有雨意的
examples: His eyes were a watery blue.
His eyes were red and watery.
There was a watery discharge from her ear.
Inches of swell squeezed in behind us and the non-wave magnified into a watery bomb.
The rover has turned up the best evidence yet of an ancient watery Mars.
